home.hero_subtitle: Your gateway to premium travel experiences. We craft unforgettable journeys for the discerning traveler.
home.why_choose_subtitle: We define excellence in tourism with our comprehensive services and attention to detail.
home.feature_1_desc: Access to exclusive resorts and hidden gems worldwide.
home.feature_2_desc: Luxury air travel arrangements with top-tier airlines.
home.feature_3_desc: Dedicated concierge service throughout your journey.

about.hero_subtitle: Redefining the art of travel through meticulous planning and unparalleled service.
about.mission_p1: IstPlus Tourism Company was established in 2021 in Turkey (Istanbul) after more than 8 years of experience. It is a leading company in the Turkish tourism market and holds a membership of the Association of Turkish Travel Agencies. It provides integrated tourism services at competitive prices with high professionalism.
about.mission_p2: IstPlus Company always seeks to expand in the labor market by increasing its professionalism in performing business so that it is always up to the trust granted to it by its customers.
about.address: Address: Balabanağa, Büyük Reşitpaşa Cd, 34000 Laleli/İstanbul

services.title: Our Services and +
services.subtitle: Comprehensive travel solutions designed for the discerning traveler.
services.flight_desc: IstPlus provides flight booking services to all parts of the world on all international and local airlines at very competitive prices through many specialized programs.
services.hotel_desc: Through a large network of relationships with many local and international hotels, IstPlus offers the best deals for hotel accommodation for individuals and groups.
services.insurance_desc: We have comprehensive insurance systems, including many different insurance companies where we provide health insurance, travel insurance, and more.
services.transfer_desc: Our services also include transfers to and from airports in Istanbul and beyond. IstPlus provides the best cars with experienced drivers (Arabic and English speaking).
services.tour_desc: Given our long experience in the Turkish market, we organize trips and sightseeing tours in all Turkish cities tailored to your desires.
services.conference_desc: IstPlus organizes conferences and workshops for many parties such as civil society organizations and educational institutions in various Turkish cities.
services.visa_desc: We assist you in submitting your visa application file. We also provide electronic visas, Umrah visas, and more.
services.ready_desc: Contact our specialized reservation team to discuss your travel plans.

footer.brand_desc: Crafting unforgettable visual journeys and premium travel experiences for the discerning explorer.

reservations.title: Book Your Journey
reservations.subtitle: Secure your premium travel experience today.
reservations.message_ph: Any dietary requirements, flight preferences, or questions?
reservations.email_hero_sub: and we're genuinely glad you reached out
reservations.email_step1_desc: Our team is looking at your booking details to match you with the right travel specialist.
reservations.email_step2_title: You'll hear from us within 24 hours
reservations.email_step2_desc: We aim to respond the same business day. Weekend submissions will be answered first thing Monday.
reservations.email_step3_title: We'll tailor a plan just for you
reservations.email_step3_desc: No generic packages — we'll work with your dates, destination, and preferences to craft something worth the journey.
reservations.email_body: Thank you for your reservation with IstPlus Tourism. Here is a summary of your booking:
reservations.email_closing: Our team will be in touch with you shortly to confirm your reservation. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us at info@istplustourism.com or call +90 542 146 15 21.
